critical_notice: SPEC-004 (Implementation Roadmap) DRAFTED. 8 milestones defined (M1-M7). Pending human approval. Dev sensors first, ocean-grade later.

tasks.title: Define SPEC-000: Target Architecture
tasks.description: Define the North Star specification for OceanPulse. What does the completed system look like? This blocks all major architectural decisions.

tasks.title: Investigate ADT Panel Sync Failure
tasks.description: User reports panel at oceanpulse.pt/adt_panel/ was not updated after Overseer sync request. Check FTP upload, data.json generation, and deployment process.

tasks.title: TDS Sensor Validation
tasks.description: Validate TDS sensor readings via Arduino Mega on Pin A0. STATUS: Dry-test of firmware stack SUCCESS. Pi-to-Mega JSON protocol verified. DATA: 1235.5 ppm (Dry/Air).

subtasks.title: Wet Calibration
subtasks.description: Submerge TDS sensor in water and calibrate against known TDS solution. STATUS: Wet test SUCCESS. Sensor stabilized at 515.3 ppm.

tasks.title: Serial Bridge Implementation
tasks.description: Establish reliable JSON-framed serial protocol between Pi and Mega at 115200 baud

tasks.title: Relay Control via Mega
tasks.description: Implement relay control on Pin 2 (Active HIGH) for both System A and B. STATUS: UPTIME command added to track reset events. BLOCKER: Pis unreachable.

tasks.title: LoRa Module Integration
tasks.description: Connect and configure LoRa modules for Pi-to-Pi communication per SPEC-002. STATUS: Python bridges (Main/Health) implemented with LoRa-E5 AT P2P mode.

tasks.title: Backend API Routes
tasks.description: Implement Flask routes: GET /api/telemetry, POST /api/command per SPEC-001

tasks.title: Frontend Dashboard UI
tasks.description: Build dark-mode mission control UI with System A and System B cards per SPEC-001

tasks.title: Real-time TDS Chart
tasks.description: Implement Chart.js graph showing last 60 seconds of TDS data with live updates

tasks.title: Dual-Circuit Control Panel
tasks.description: Add separate control cards for Main Circuit and Health Circuit per SPEC-002 Section 3

tasks.title: ADT Panel - Task Board View
tasks.description: Implement kanban-style task board (Pending/In Progress/Completed) per SPEC-003

tasks.title: ADT Panel - Hierarchy View
tasks.description: Implement collapsible tree view showing Project → Phase → Spec → Tasks per SPEC-003

tasks.title: ADT Panel - Delegation Tree
tasks.description: Implement interactive Delegation Tree view per SPEC-003 v2.0. Two-panel layout: (1) Collapsible tree showing Spec → Delegator → Role → Task → Subtask hierarchy with status indicators, click-to-expand, and 'Trace Authority' feature. (2) Summary matrix showing Role × Agent counts with color-coded workload. Requires tasks.json migration to schema v2.0 with delegation fields.

subtasks.title: Migrate tasks.json to schema v2.0
subtasks.description: Add delegation object to all existing tasks

subtasks.title: Build tree component
subtasks.description: Collapsible tree with spec/role/task nodes

subtasks.title: Build summary matrix
subtasks.description: Role × Agent matrix with workload colors

tasks.title: Deploy Enhanced ADT Panel
tasks.description: Sync updated panel with new views to oceanpulse.pt/adt_panel/

tasks.title: Approve SPEC-004: Implementation Roadmap
tasks.description: Human review and approval of SPEC-004 which defines 8 milestones (M1-M7) from bench to buoy. Includes dev sensor strategy, procurement waves, and dependency graph.

tasks.title: M1: Dev Sensor Platform
tasks.description: Build full sensor-to-dashboard pipeline using cheap dev sensors (TDS, DS18B20, pH). Design sensor abstraction layer for future ocean-grade swap. See SPEC-005 (to be written).

subtasks.title: Write SPEC-005 (Dev Sensor Platform)
subtasks.description: Detailed spec for M1: pinouts, serial commands, abstraction layer, dashboard updates

subtasks.title: Firmware: sensor abstraction layer + dev drivers
subtasks.description: TDS analog, DS18B20 OneWire, cheap pH analog drivers with standardized command interface

subtasks.title: Bridge + Dashboard: multi-sensor display
subtasks.description: Forward all sensor types to Obs Center, display on dashboard

tasks.title: M2: Health Circuit & Self-Healing
tasks.description: Health Arduino monitoring internal conditions, Pi-to-Pi LAN comms, cross-restart relay. See SPEC-006 (to be written).

subtasks.title: Write SPEC-006 (Health Circuit)
subtasks.description: Detailed spec for M2: health sensors, LAN protocol, restart mechanism

subtasks.title: Firmware: REBOOT:SYS logic
subtasks.description: Implement hardware power-cycle logic on Pin 3 for both Main and Health Arduinos.

tasks.title: M2.5: LoRa Test & Configuration Tool
tasks.description: Build LoRa parameter tuning and range testing tool. STATUS: SPEC-007 written. AT firmware (9600 baud) VERIFIED. lora_tester.py and lora_handler.py fully support AT mode.

subtasks.title: Write SPEC-007 (LoRa Configurator)
subtasks.description: Detailed spec for M2.5: parameter control, metrics, range test mode, profiles

subtasks.title: Implement lora_tester.py with AT support
subtasks.description: Add support for LoRa-E5 factory AT command set (9600 baud).

tasks.title: M3: LoRa Communication Chain
tasks.description: End-to-end: Sensor → Mega → Pi → LoRa → Onshore Gateway → Obs Center. STATUS: VERIFIED. Full chain functional using LoRa-E5 AT P2P mode. Sensors data relays to Flask API.

subtasks.title: Write SPEC-008 (LoRa Chain)
subtasks.description: Detailed spec for M3: gateway setup, packet format, redundant path, Obs Center integration

subtasks.title: Implement onshore_bridge.py
subtasks.description: Gateway relay script to forward LoRa packets to web API.

subtasks.title: Strictly LoRa Telemetry Enforcement
subtasks.description: Configure bridges to use ONLY LoRa for mission telemetry and commands.

tasks.title: M4: Safe-Pulse Oil Detection System
tasks.description: Complete UV fluorescence detection with Triple-Lock safety (PIR + Ultrasonic + Warning Strobe), NE555 hard-stop, camera sync, edge AI. See SPEC-009 (to be written).

subtasks.title: Write SPEC-009 (Oil Detection)
subtasks.description: Detailed spec for M4: NE555 circuit, safety interlock firmware, camera sync, AI pipeline

tasks.title: M5: Power Autonomy
tasks.description: LiFePO4 + Victron MPPT + Solar integration. Real power budget measurement. 48h autonomy target. See SPEC-010 (to be written).

subtasks.title: Write SPEC-010 (Power)
subtasks.description: Detailed spec for M5: power distribution, charging, budget measurements, low-power modes

tasks.title: M6: Ocean-Grade Sensor Upgrade
tasks.description: Swap dev sensors for Atlas EZO (EC + DO) and Bar30. RS485/I2C wiring. Validate sensor abstraction layer -- only drivers change. See SPEC-011 (to be written).

subtasks.title: Write SPEC-011 (Ocean-Grade Sensors)
subtasks.description: Detailed spec for M6: Atlas EZO wiring, calibration, driver swap, new sensor types (DO, Depth)

tasks.title: M7: Integration & Enclosure
tasks.description: Waterproof housing, Weipu connectors, physical mounting, land integration test, controlled water deployment. See SPEC-012.

subtasks.title: Write SPEC-012 (Integration)
subtasks.description: Detailed spec for M7: enclosure design, connector layout, mounting plan, test protocol

tasks.title: Implement LoRa Test Panel UI
tasks.description: Develop the web-based diagnostic interface for LoRa radio link tuning and testing per SPEC-018.

tasks.title: M3.1: Downstream Telecommand Handler
tasks.description: Implement the telecommand parser on the buoy and the command dispatcher on the onshore gateway per SPEC-008.

subtasks.title: Buoy: Command Parser
subtasks.description: Listen for C:TARGET:CMD packets and route to local Serial Bridge.

subtasks.title: Gateway: Command Dispatcher
subtasks.description: Provide API endpoint for Obs Center to inject LoRa telecommands.

tasks.title: Implement Headless Kiosk Display
tasks.description: Set up Cage + Chromium on lab-center Pi to display the dashboard on the physical screen without a desktop interface per SPEC-021.

tasks.title: ADT Panel UI Refinements (SPEC-013)
tasks.description: Implemented role-based grouping for completed tasks, spec status icons (Verified/Pending), and workflow auto-scroll. Verified modal close behavior.

tasks.title: Health Pi Connectivity Investigation
tasks.description: Investigate and resolve Health Pi (192.168.43.49) reachability issues. STATUS: Pi is ONLINE and reachable. Serial ports detected. Permission issue resolved via dialout group addition.

tasks.title: Implement Lab Center Connectivity
tasks.description: Configure WiFi networks (Martinhal, DIRECT-Ez-WP6) and per-network proxy settings on lab-center Pi per SPEC-022. STATUS: Script ops/configure_lab_wifi.sh created. Pending manual execution due to Pi unreachable status.
